title: stewartia micrantha
intro: Stewartia micrantha, also known as the Korean stewartia or smallflower stewartia, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia, particularly in China and Korea. The medicinal properties of Stewartia micrantha lie in its bark, which contains compounds like stewartine and quercetin, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In traditional herbal medicine, Stewartia micrantha is often prepared as a tea or decoction, or used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
